data.content: Implementation review approved on branch b5c5-settings-model-pulldowns at commit 704c9e17569e. Verified the scan layer now supplies real multi-model catalogs for Claude, Codex, and Gemini; selected pills resolve to model names instead of provider names, including the Claude Opus 4.6 case; and scanned selections can be cleared via the new remove path without affecting unrelated agents. Confirmed test coverage in settings scan/model-label/UI tests for provider catalogs, pill labels, and clear affordances. Validation rerun in /Users/cartine/foolery-b5c5: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
